brand_identity.territory: North Miami, FL (operated remotely from Spain/Panama)

chevron.blink_rule: ALWAYS blinking in every context — no exceptions. Not on hover, not on active — permanently blinking.
chevron.animation_method: CSS keyframes (HTML/CSS context) + SMIL animate (SVG favicon)
chevron.css_class_rule: .lt-chevron { color: #00FFD1; animation: prompt-blink 1.1s step-end infinite; display: inline-block; transform: scaleY(1.45) scaleX(0.72); transform-origin: center; letter-spacing: 0; margin: 0 -0.01em; }

studio_suffix.rule: MUST be visually much darker/dimmer than UNREAL>ILLE — never same weight or color. 0.32 opacity max.

mono.usage: Labels, metadata, tags, badges, code, nav metadata, footer credits

footer.rule: Standard footer applies to ALL outputs — own and client, internal and external.

col_1.label: Client Logo / Own Logo
col_1.rule_own_outputs: Unrealville logotype (.lt-logotype size-footer) with blinking chevron.
col_1.rule_client_outputs: CLIENT logo + sub-descriptor — NEVER Unrealville logo in this slot.
col_1.golden_rule: In any deliverable generated FOR a client (brand book, deck, guide, report, proposal), Col 1 = client logo. Always. No exceptions.

nav.right: document title + metadata in Space Mono

footer.right: credits block in Space Mono uppercase chalk_42 with cyan highlight

icr_badge.description: Animated pulse dot + Space Mono label. Applied to all ICR-compliant document footers.
icr_badge.rule: MANDATORY in footer of every document output — no exceptions.
icr_badge.placement: Footer — always. Center or alongside footer credits.

favicon.spec: SVG — chevron > in #00FFD1, transparent background, prompt-blink 1.1s step-end
favicon.animation: prompt-blink 1.1s step-end infinite (CSS) + SMIL for favicon context
favicon.embed_method: base64 data URI — embed in <head> of EVERY HTML output
favicon.rule: REQUIRED in every HTML document output — no exceptions

logo_dark.status: corrected 2026-04-10 — chevron #00FFD1, bg transparent, blink embedded

logotype_png.note: Chalk version — reference only. SVG preferred.

output_standards._mandatory_checklist: Claude MUST verify all items before delivering any output
every_html_output: favicon <link> tag in <head> — first element, before stylesheets
@keyframes prompt-blink in <style> (NOT chevron-blink, NOT chev-listen — deprecated)
.lt-chevron class with animation prompt-blink 1.1s step-end applied
.lt-studio class with color rgba(242,240,236,0.32) — visually much dimmer than main logotype
Footer: Col1=own logo OR client logo (see footer.golden_rule), Col2=rights, Col3=signature EN

repo.note: HTML docs and JSON blueprint go in brands/Unrealville/ root. SVG/PNG assets go in brands/Unrealville/assets/. Do NOT store HTML documents inside assets/.
